misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 In Chapter 1179, we see Imu transforming in the castle. In the new chapter, Imu isn't fully visible in the Joyboy scene. And the structure in the flashback scene could really fit with Ve
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 In Chapter 1179, we see Imu transforming in the castle. In the new chapter, Imu isn't fully visible in the Joyboy scene. And the structure in the flashback scene could really fit with Vearth. Perhaps that's why he shrouds his body in darkness, because he doesn't want his followers to see him like that.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 Glad i'm not the only one who see similarity between the scene with Katakuri and Imu..
